meta.title: BetVision AI — Calibrated football analysis
meta.description: Probabilistic football analysis. Calibrated odds, honest edges, no guarantees.

errors.internal: Something went wrong on our side. Please try again.
errors.bad_request: That request could not be processed.
errors.unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.forbidden: You do not have access to that.
errors.not_found: We could not find what you were looking for.
errors.too_many_requests: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.network: We could not reach the server. Check your connection.

landing.title: Calibrated readings, not guarantees.
landing.lead: BetVision AI turns match data into calibrated probabilities and honest edges. It measures value against the market — it never promises a winner.
landing.note: Probabilistic, not guaranteed. Every number is a calibrated estimate, not a certainty.

instrument.label: Model confidence
instrument.caption: Illustrative reading. Every value is calibrated on historical outcomes.

model.title: Models, not hunches
model.body: Probabilities come from statistical models and backtesting. The narrative explains them — it never invents a number.

risk.title: Risk you set
risk.body: Choose how much variance you will accept. Your risk appetite shapes which bets surface — never the underlying probabilities.

sources.title: Sources you can check
sources.body: Every report cites the data behind it and flags staleness, so you can audit the reasoning instead of trusting it blindly.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Continue to your calibrated dashboard.
login.error: We could not sign you in. Check your email and password.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: A sober, calibrated view of football markets.
register.passwordHint: At least 12 characters, with upper- and lower-case letters, a number, and a symbol.
register.terms: I accept the Terms and the Responsible Gambling policy.
register.error: We could not create your account. Please review the fields and try again.

validation.passwordComplexity: Include upper- and lower-case letters, a number, and a symbol.
validation.ageRequired: You must confirm you are 18 or older.
validation.termsRequired: You must accept the Terms to continue.

dashboard.subtitle: Your calibrated view. Numbers stay sober; risk is always in view.

empty.recentPredictions: No predictions yet. Once you analyse a fixture, it will appear here.
empty.watchlist: Your watchlist is empty. Follow a team or fixture to track it here.

dashboard.soon: Available once the analysis endpoints ship.

footer.rgBody: Predictions are probabilistic estimates, not advice to bet. Set limits and take breaks.
footer.disclaimer: Not financial advice. No guaranteed results.
footer.reminder: Higher risk means higher variance — never a guaranteed higher return.
